use_cases: Real-time audio input visualization for voice interfaces and AI assistants
Audio recording playback with visual waveform representation
Voice message display in messaging or communication applications
Podcast or audio content player waveform visualization
Speech-to-text interface with live audio feedback
ai_summary: A live waveform visualization component that renders real-time audio input as animated bars or waves. Part of ElevenLabs' voice AI interface toolkit, designed for displaying audio playback, voice messages, or live speech input with smooth continuous animations. Clean, minimalist visual style suitable for modern SaaS and AI product interfaces.
